briefdescription.para: IPCT tasks.

detaileddescription.para: Acknowledged event for the SEND[0] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[1] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[2] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[3] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[4] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[5] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[6] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[7] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[8] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[9] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[10] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[11] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[12] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[13] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[14] task.
Acknowledged event for the SEND[15] task.
Ready event for the SEND[0] task.
Ready event for the SEND[1] task.
Ready event for the SEND[2] task.
Ready event for the SEND[3] task.

briefdescription.para: IPCT events.

detaileddescription.para: Shortcut between event RECEIVE[0] and task ACK[0].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[1] and task ACK[1].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[2] and task ACK[2].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[3] and task ACK[3].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[4] and task ACK[4].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[5] and task ACK[5].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[6] and task ACK[6].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[7] and task ACK[7].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[8] and task ACK[8].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[9] and task ACK[9].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[10] and task ACK[10].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[11] and task ACK[11].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[12] and task ACK[12].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[13] and task ACK[13].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[14] and task ACK[14].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[15] and task ACK[15].

enumvalue.name: NRF_IPCT_ALL_SHORTS_MASK
enumvalue.initializer: = NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE0_ACK0_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE1_ACK1_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE2_ACK2_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE3_ACK3_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE4_ACK4_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE5_ACK5_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE6_ACK6_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE7_ACK7_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE8_ACK8_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE9_ACK9_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE10_ACK10_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE11_ACK11_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE12_ACK12_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE13_ACK13_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE14_ACK14_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE15_ACK15_MASK

detaileddescription.para: Shortcut between event RECEIVE[0] and task FLUSH[0].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[1] and task FLUSH[1].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[2] and task FLUSH[2].
Shortcut between event RECEIVE[3] and task FLUSH[3].

enumvalue.name: NRF_IPCT_ALL_SHORTS_MASK
enumvalue.initializer: = NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE0_ACK0_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE1_ACK1_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE2_ACK2_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE3_ACK3_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE4_ACK4_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE5_ACK5_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE6_ACK6_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE7_ACK7_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE8_ACK8_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE9_ACK9_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE10_ACK10_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE11_ACK11_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE12_ACK12_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE13_ACK13_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE14_ACK14_MASK | NRF_IPCT_SHORT_RECEIVE15_ACK15_MASK

briefdescription.para: IPCT shortcuts.
IPCT interrupts.
Function for triggering the specified IPCT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be triggered.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified IPCT task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Specified task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified IPCT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the IPCT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified IPCT event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Specified event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be enabled.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_ipct_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be disabled.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_ipct_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be checked.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_ipct_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Index of interrupt group to be retrieved.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_ipct_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the DPPI subscribe configuration for a given IPCT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
DPPI channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the DPPI subscribe configuration for a given IPCT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given IPCT task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the DPPI publish configuration for a given IPCT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
DPPI channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the DPPI publish configuration for a given IPCT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given IPCT event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting value of the task overflow status for SEND task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
SEND task index to be checked.
Task overflow has happened.
Task overflow has not happened.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting SEND task by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the SEND task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting ACK task by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the ACK task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting ACKED event by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the ACKED event.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting RECEIVE event by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the RECEIVE event.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting FLUSH task by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the FLUSH task.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting READY event by its index.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the READY event.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the configuration of IPCT shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be set.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating presence of ACK task and ACKED event.
Symbol indicating presence of READY event.
Symbol indicating presence of FLUSH task.
Number of send tasks.
Number of recieve tasks.
Number of flush tasks.
Number of ready events.
Hardware access layer for managing the Inter-Processor Communication Transceiver (IPCT) peripheral.
